full_text:
Pan Feng 潘鳳
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Feng (潘鳳). Officer of Han Fu. Wielded a giant axe and fought with Hua Xiong, but was killed. Pan Feng is a fictional character. Pan Feng was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty. Pan Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Introduced as a general to Han Fu, Pan Feng volunteered to duel Hua Xiong to remove him as a threat. Pan Feng would lose his life in that duel.
